item.title: Gave Elf On A Shelf A Try.
item.dc:creator: jeffmadams

item.title: Deep water scientists film rare sighting
item.description: Most squid lay their eggs on the seafloor and don’t provide any parental care. The black-eyed squid (Gonatus onyx) is one of the few species that brood their eggs. Source: Schmidt Ocean Institute
item.dc:creator: NoahTheMask

item.dc:creator: inkican

item.title: So... Im a BlueSky-er now?
item.description:
About 6 years back I made an official CCPA, and other types, requests to Facebook, Meta, Instagram, and Snapchat to completely delete all information about me and to delete my accounts. From seeing all this Twitter (X) dumpster fires, I decided to join in the mass exodus (even though I never used Twitter in the first place) and joined BlueSky just to show my support. I don't want to add any real life friends as my online privacy is important to me. I don't care enough about any 1 celebrity or influencer to 'follow' them. I get my memes from Imgur. I get my news from Ground News. ...So what do I do now? This means I'm cool now, right? Is my virture signaling showing(sarcasm)? I'm helping!
This is how I feel
item.dc:creator: TheSteakBoyHimself

item.title: Forever missing my sweet boy.
item.description: It’s not an anniversary of his loss or anything. It’s just another day of missing him and feeling the most profound longing for which I have no words to adequately describe. He’s been gone for a year and three months tomorrow. It feels like both a decade and a day he’s been gone. I guess that’s one of the many crazy ways grief works. It bends time. It works its way into your bones, your dna, everything that you are. I think a lot about how I’ll feel this for the rest of my days. I’ll miss him for the rest of my life. But I guess if I’m the one that has to carry the burden of missing him, I’ll take that over having left him behind. But there are many days I feel that I died with him, and just as many that I kind of wish I had. I wouldn’t wish this hurt on anyone, but some days I wish more folks could grasp the weight of loss and hold just a little more space for grief. If you’re longing for a lost love, I’ll hold space for you. And I see you. I made this video not long after he died. I always sang the first verse to him, but could never sing the second verse, because I never wanted that to be true. But it is true now, and while finding him in me dreams is a blessing, I wake with lead in my chest and stomach when reality sets back in and I don’t find him in bed with me. I miss you and love you, forever and always, my sweet boy. I’m just throwing this into the ether because I’m really, really sad today and I needed to put it all somewhere.
item.dc:creator: AtlasHuggedrescuepup

item.title: Another Day on the HelpDesk Meme Dump
item.description:
Okay - last one. Seriously. Hope yall unplugged after standing guard over Thanksgiving. Time for yall to get some RnR. Don't make me disable your accounts.
You dont have to step forward to be a hero, everyone else just takes a step back
This is how it be sometimes. Sorry.
The green slice happens A LOT
Okay - LPT? DO THIS. You might not care, but HR will.
Just dont "actually" look at it then. Jeez.
July 19. Never forget.
MFA is great - but it is not bullet proof. Stop clicking the links. I swear ...
msft - plz stop. No one asked for this. And most of the normied wont want it disabled.
And that's how one of the sysadmins formatted their macbook. Rf Rm, iykyk
At some point, a response from SEAL Team Six is warranted, right? How many finscams do we gotta live through before someone puts a stop to it?
Everyone makes this mistake at least twice.
"Yeah - I know the fundamentals of a data lake. Yeah. I used SQL before."
Oh yeah - the AI stuff? Its getting soooo much better...
VXUG - we love you. Stay weird.
Never give up. That part of you will lose sooner or later.
AI everything plz. It's gonna do all the jobs. Right?
Aaaaand its still the running theme. Every conference? ai. Every vendor call? ai.
Never too early to get caught by the FBI
The SAN is gonna cost too much to replace. Move everything to Google drive. Every. Thing.
What happened to the schema?!?!
Dont forget to include the regex documentation.
... no comment. The malware was part of an investigation. We swear.
This? I dont like it. Me and my whole team is in this photo.
Verkada. Is that you?
Third shift? We have shifts here?
^ This - everyone is like omg ur so cool. You make tech money now. No. No I dont. And when I do? I dont even get to enjoy it.
If my CIO could read, we'd be so broke right now.
This is fine. Everything is fine.
We seriously have a super-size problem
Every. Single. Time.
These are the emotional support memes. Without them, I'd be a wreck.
Yall crazy with your SUDO voodoo
Google - we love you but sometimes, you bring out the worst in us
Do it. Take care of yourself. Even if its for a single minute.
Never forget. The users still think we're too slow - even if we bring response times down to record breaking numbers of 5 minutes
Anyone got infosec stickers or swag? Looking to trade one day with the big kids at BlackHat
Its okay - we only saw everyone's employee ID, address, phone number AND this Zoom is being recorded
Honestly? Powershell could use one.
Remember when games had no internet connectivity? Pepperidge Farms remembers.
Country Roads playlist on spotify is a little over 4 hours long, with so many variations
The newbies dont know we store backups on VHS
TO ALL YALL CFOs OUT THERE. PLZ STOP.
Sometimes its a conspiracy, sometimes is paranoia, but sometimes? I am convinced the facebook app is listening to me complain about the terrible food selection in my area.
Might as well. Seriously.
Okay - for real? Who knew CURL worked in Windows...
Really. Idc anymore.
We just took ours down last year. Yeah - we're on the cutting edge now.
oh buddy. So. This one is too real. We may or may not still have a 2008 box running. Its gonna be too much work to replace it. Just gotta keep those defense in depths layers going - always always always add more.
It cost the company the hourly wages, plus mileage, plus opportunity costs, whatever that means.
item.dc:creator: thumpaer

item.description: ...along with his reluctant cat.
item.dc:creator: Viscouse
